This adapter reads health data from your: This adapter reads health data from your Ultrahuman Ring via the Partner API. You need API credentials directly from Ultrahuman.
1. Send an email to feedback@ultrahuman.com requesting API access
2. You will receive an API Key and an Ac: 2. You will receive an API Key and an Access Code
3. Enter the Access Code in your Ultrahu: 3. Enter the Access Code in your Ultrahuman app (Profile → Settings → Partner ID)
4. Enter the API Key and your Ultrahuman: 4. Enter the API Key and your Ultrahuman email below
Email template (copy and send to feedbac: Email template (copy and send to feedback@ultrahuman.com)
Select the text above, copy it (Ctrl+C /: Select the text above, copy it (Ctrl+C / Cmd+C) and paste it into your email.
The API key you received from Ultrahuman: The API key you received from Ultrahuman
The email address linked to your Ultrahu: The email address linked to your Ultrahuman account. If you signed up with Apple Privacy Relay, the address ends with @privaterelay.appleid.com. You can find it in the app under Profile → Settings (gear icon) → Account (at the top).
Important: The Access Code must be enter: Important: The Access Code must be entered in your Ultrahuman app under Profile → Settings → Partner ID. Without this, the API cannot access your data.
Support this free adapter – buy me a cof: Support this free adapter – buy me a coffee!
The Ultrahuman Ring syncs data periodica: The Ultrahuman Ring syncs data periodically to the cloud (not in real-time). Polling too frequently wastes resources and may trigger rate limits.
How often to fetch new data from the API: How often to fetch new data from the API. Recommended: 30 minutes.
Recommended: 30 min | Minimum: 5 min | M: Recommended: 30 min | Minimum: 5 min | Maximum: 1440 min (24h)
Ideas for using your health data: Ideas for using your health data
Here are some ideas for what you can do: Here are some ideas for what you can do with your Ultrahuman data in ioBroker:
• Display sleep score and efficiency on: • Display sleep score and efficiency on a dashboard (VIS, Jarvis, iQontrol)
• Create charts showing HRV and heart ra: • Create charts showing HRV and heart rate trends over time
• Show sleep stages (REM, deep, light) a: • Show sleep stages (REM, deep, light) as a pie chart
• Display daily step count with progress: • Display daily step count with progress bar towards your goal
• Gentle wake-up light when sleep effici: • Gentle wake-up light when sleep efficiency was low
• Reminder to go to bed earlier if sleep: • Reminder to go to bed earlier if sleep score drops below threshold
• Adjust room temperature based on skin: • Adjust room temperature based on skin temperature trends
• Morning briefing via Alexa/Google with: • Morning briefing via Alexa/Google with last night's sleep summary
• Activate relaxation mode (dim lights,: • Activate relaxation mode (dim lights, calm music) when HRV is low
• Send push notification when daily step: • Send push notification when daily step goal is reached
• Log all health data to InfluxDB for lo: • Log all health data to InfluxDB for long-term analysis
• Weekly health report via Telegram or e: • Weekly health report via Telegram or email
• Alert when resting heart rate is unusu: • Alert when resting heart rate is unusually high (possible illness)
• Compare sleep data with weather or cal: • Compare sleep data with weather or calendar events
ioBroker.ultrahuman reads health metrics: ioBroker.ultrahuman reads health metrics from your Ultrahuman Ring and makes them available as ioBroker objects.
Sleep – Efficiency, duration, stages (RE: Sleep – Efficiency, duration, stages (REM, deep, light), score, cycles
Heart rate – Resting, night, average, mi: Heart rate – Resting, night, average, min/max, trend
SpO2 – If supported by your ring: SpO2 – If supported by your ring
Activity – Steps, active minutes, moveme: Activity – Steps, active minutes, movement/recovery index, VO2 max
